subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! My desire concerning the handmaiden of God, that pure leaf who resideth near the mother of Him Who beareth the Most Great Name, is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه تمنائی که از امة الله ورقه طیبه مجاوره والده حضرت اسم الله علیه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
